abort.single_instance_allowed: Device Sentinel is already configured. Only a single instance is supported.

data_description.low_threshold: A battery at or below this level is flagged low. It clears once it climbs 2 points above the threshold.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: These settings are stored now and used once detection notifications are built.

data_description.notify_targets: Where routine notifications are sent. Discovered from your system.
data_description.quiet_start: Routine notifications are held from this time.
data_description.quiet_end: Routine notifications resume at this time.
data_description.reminder_time: A once-daily summary of outstanding items is sent at this time.
data_description.high_priority_pierces_quiet: When on, a high-priority item is delivered even during quiet hours.
